rosbridgeUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the rosbridge server on your robot

angularSign.description: Multiplier applied to commanded angular_z. Set to -1 if left/right are flipped on this robot.

faceDirectionYTopic.description: ROS2 topic for face or neck vertical direction control

faceDirectionYDownValue.description: Value published to faceDirectionYTopic when the operator says look down

faceDirectionYUpValue.description: Value published to faceDirectionYTopic when the operator says look up

faceDirectionYCenterValue.description: Value published to faceDirectionYTopic when the operator says look straight or center

faceDirectionYRepeatHz.description: Repeat rate in Hz for /face_direction_y bursts

faceDirectionYDurationMs.description: Burst duration in milliseconds for /face_direction_y publishes
